failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: VS Code runtime not available in environment. Extension diagnostics logic verified via code inspection (extension.js spawns linter with --json flag and creates proper Diagnostic objects), but actual runtime behavior cannot be tested without VS Code.

appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed VS Code extension assertions 004/005 require VS Code desktop runtime which is not available. extension.js correctly spawns linter with --json flag and produces Diagnostic objects matching linter errors. Linter JSON output verified for both valid (samples pass) and invalid (tooling/vscode-extension/README.md returns errors) cases.
